item.title: Download Typora 1.13.4
item.description: Typora gives you a seamless experience as both a reader and a writer. It removes the preview window, the mode switcher, the syntax symbols of the markup source code, and all other unnecessary distractions. Instead, it provides an actual live preview to help you focus on the content itself. item.title: Download SeekFast 6.8 Build 1
item.description: SeekFast has the ability to quickly search for specific text in all documents on your computer. SeekFast then sorts the results in a way that makes it easy to find the text you're looking for, see its context, and open the file that contains it. All you have to do is select a folder to search for and enter search words or phrases - you'll get all the sentences they appear in within seconds. This is especially useful if you need to find something quickly. SeekFast uses state-of-the-art...

item.title: Download Bandizip 7.42
item.description: Bandizip is a utility used to open files in compressed formats such as ZIP, ZIPX, RAR, CAB, 7Z, TAR, ISO, LZH, BZ2. Bandizip provides an easy to use interface along with Windows Explorer integration. Bandizip also comes with the feature "store preview" unique allows you to preview contents of an archive file from the context menu without the need to open a file stored ago. Bandizip additional support Unicode to display international characters, can unzip multiple files at the same time...
